title: genomic-medicine-sweden/haeger pipeline parameters
description: A nextflow pipeline for post-processing TRANA results and exporting to CDM format.

csv.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples.
csv.help_text: CSV file with sample information for read concatenation and processing.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved.

sequencing_run.description: Path to sequencing run directory containing fastq_pass folder.
sequencing_run.help_text: Directory path to the sequencing run containing the fastq_pass subdirectory with raw reads.

db.help_text: Path to the database directory used by TRANA for taxonomic classification.

run_trana.description: Whether to run the TRANA workflow.
run_trana.help_text: If true, runs TRANA workflow for taxonomic analysis. If false, uses existing TRANA results.

save_merged_reads.description: Whether to save merged/concatenated reads to output.
save_merged_reads.help_text: If true, saves the concatenated reads files to the output directory.

containers_dir.help_text: Path to directory containing Singularity container images for offline execution.

offline.description: Run in offline mode using local containers.
offline.help_text: If true, uses local container images instead of pulling from remote registries.

publish_dir_overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite existing output files.
publish_dir_overwrite.help_text: If true, overwrites existing files in output directories.

copy_to_cron_dir.description: Whether to copy CDM results to cron directory.
copy_to_cron_dir.help_text: If true, copies CDM output to /fs1/results/cron/qc for automated processing.

trana_results_paths.description: Paths to existing TRANA result files when run_trana is false.
trana_results_paths.help_text: Object containing paths to TRANA output files for processing existing results.

nanostats_txt.description: Path template for NanoStats text files.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs that can be requested for any single job.
max_cpus.help_text: Use to set an upper-limit for the CPU requirement for each process.

max_memory.description: Maximum amount of memory that can be requested for any single job.
max_memory.help_text: Use to set an upper-limit for the memory requirement for each process.

max_time.description: Maximum amount of time that can be requested for any single job.
max_time.help_text: Use to set an upper-limit for the time requirement for each process.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime
validate_params.help_text: By default, parameters are validated against the schema at runtime.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.
monochrome_logs.help_text: Set to disable colourful command line output.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

trana_options.title: TRANA workflow options
trana_options.description: Options for TRANA taxonomic analysis workflow.

read_processing_options.title: Read processing options
read_processing_options.description: Options for read concatenation and processing.

cdm_export_options.title: CDM export options
cdm_export_options.description: Options for exporting results to CDM format.

infrastructure_options.title: Infrastructure options
infrastructure_options.description: Options for container management and execution environment.

max_job_request_options.title: Max job request options
max_job_request_options.description: Set the top limit for requested resources for any single job.
